blocks.value: Restores demo repeatability, safely on a SHARED Concert instance: reverts pom.xml (both repos) + VulnerableSearchRepository.java (java-app-cve) to each repo's vulnerable-baseline git tag on main, then deletes ONLY the applications named in application_names from Concert - never a blanket wipe, so other teams data in a shared instance is left untouched.

inputs.name: code
inputs.value:
`"""
Script to make the demo repeatable, safe to run against a SHARED Concert
instance (one also used by other teams/demos - this must never touch
data it didn't create itself):
  1. For each repo in repos, revert the listed files on target_branch
     back to their known-vulnerable content (from baseline_ref), via
     direct commits through the GitHub Contents API - no PR, no review,
     this is demo housekeeping, not a real change. Two repos are reset
     this way: java-app-cve (bankdemo) and fraud-cve.
  2. Delete only OUR applications from Concert - matched by name against
     application_names, never a blanket wipe of every application/
     source_repo in the instance. Deleting an application cascades to
     its own source_repos (confirmed live: deleting a mis-scanned
     "bankdemo" that had picked up both java-app-cve's and fraud-cve's
     source_repos left source_repos at 0 afterwards) - so this alone is
     enough to also clean up source_repos scoped to our apps.

This uses subprocess.run() to execute curl, never use "shell=True" on
user-provided input!!

Input parameters (variables injected by workflow):
- repos:                [required, string]  JSON array of repos to reset, each:
                         {"gh_repo_url": "...", "gh_api_token": "...",
                          "baseline_ref": "vulnerable-baseline",
                          "target_branch": "main", "reset_files": ["pom.xml", ...]}
- concert_url:          [required, string]  URL of the Concert API Gateway
- concert_api_key:      [required, string]  API Key to authenticate upon Concert
- concert_instance_id:  [required, string]  Instance ID to clean up
- application_names:    [required, string]  JSON array of application names that
                         belong to this demo - only these get deleted from Concert,
                         e.g. ["bankdemo", "fraud-cve", "legacy-win-fileserver",
                         "legacy-core-gateway", "legacy-web-portal"]
"""

import json as jsonlib
import re
from subprocess import run, PIPE, DEVNULL
from sys import exit as sys_exit


def obfuscate(input_str):
    if not input_str or len(input_str) <= 8:
        return "*" * len(input_str or "")
    return input_str[0:4] + ("*" * (len(input_str) - 4))


def curl_json(method, url, headers=None, body=None):
    command = ["curl", "--silent", "--show-error", "--request", method, "--url", url]
    for h in (headers or []):
        command.extend(["--header", h])
    if body is not None:
        command.extend(["--data", jsonlib.dumps(body)])
    result = run(command, check=False, stdout=PIPE, stderr=PIPE)
    stdout = result.stdout.decode("utf-8").strip() if result.stdout else ""
    try:
        parsed = jsonlib.loads(stdout) if stdout else {}
    except jsonlib.JSONDecodeError:
        parsed = {"_raw": stdout}
    return result.returncode, parsed


# Install curl (Python FaaS image is alpine-based, curl is not preinstalled)
try:
    run(["apk", "add", "curl"], check=True, stdout=DEVNULL, stderr=DEVNULL)
    print("curl successfully installed")
except Exception as e:
    print("ERROR - Could not install curl:", e)
    sys_exit(1)

repo_configs = jsonlib.loads(repos)
print("Input parameters")
print("=" * 100)
print("repos               :", len(repo_configs), "repo(s) to reset")
for rc in repo_configs:
    print(f"  - {rc.get('gh_repo_url')} @ {rc.get('target_branch', 'main')} <- {rc.get('baseline_ref', 'vulnerable-baseline')}")
    print(f"    token: {obfuscate(rc.get('gh_api_token'))}, files: {rc.get('reset_files')}")
print("concert_url         :", concert_url)
print("concert_api_key     :", obfuscate(concert_api_key))
print("concert_instance_id :", concert_instance_id)
print("=" * 100)

for repo_config in repo_configs:
    gh_repo_url = repo_config["gh_repo_url"]
    gh_api_token = repo_config["gh_api_token"]
    baseline_ref = repo_config.get("baseline_ref", "vulnerable-baseline")
    target_branch = repo_config.get("target_branch", "main")
    files = repo_config["reset_files"]

    match = re.match(r"https://github\.com/([^/]+)/([^/]+?)(?:\.git)?/?$", gh_repo_url)
    if not match:
        print(f"ERROR - Could not parse owner/repo out of gh_repo_url: {gh_repo_url}")
        sys_exit(1)
    owner, repo = match.group(1), match.group(2)

    gh_headers = [
        f"Authorization: Bearer {gh_api_token}",
        "Accept: application/vnd.github+json",
        "Content-Type: application/json",
    ]

    reset_results = {}
    for path in files:
        baseline_url = f"https://api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}/contents/{path}?ref={baseline_ref}"
        rc, baseline_data = curl_json("GET", baseline_url, gh_headers)
        if rc != 0 or "content" not in baseline_data:
            print(f"ERROR - Could not fetch {path} at {baseline_ref} in {repo}:", baseline_data)
            sys_exit(1)
        baseline_content_b64 = baseline_data["content"].replace("\n", "")

        current_url = f"https://api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}/contents/{path}?ref={target_branch}"
        rc, current_data = curl_json("GET", current_url, gh_headers)
        if rc != 0 or "sha" not in current_data:
            print(f"ERROR - Could not fetch current {path} on {target_branch} in {repo}:", current_data)
            sys_exit(1)
        current_sha = current_data["sha"]

        if current_data["content"].replace("\n", "") == baseline_content_b64:
            print(f"[{repo}] {path} already matches {baseline_ref} - nothing to reset")
            reset_results[path] = "already_reset"
            continue

        update_url = f"https://api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}/contents/{path}"
        update_body = {
            "message": f"chore(demo): reset {path} to {baseline_ref} for repeatable demo",
            "content": baseline_content_b64,
            "sha": current_sha,
            "branch": target_branch,
        }
        rc, update_data = curl_json("PUT", update_url, gh_headers, update_body)
        if rc != 0 or "commit" not in update_data:
            print(f"ERROR - Could not reset {path} in {repo}:", update_data)
            sys_exit(1)
        commit_sha = update_data["commit"]["sha"][:7]
        print(f"[{repo}] Reset {path} to {baseline_ref} (commit {commit_sha})")
        reset_results[path] = "reset"

    print(f"[{repo}] Code reset complete:", reset_results)

print("(pushing to each target_branch will trigger the build-and-push GitHub Action, republishing the vulnerable image to GHCR)")

concert_headers = [
    f"Authorization: C_API_KEY {concert_api_key}",
    f"InstanceId: {concert_instance_id}",
]

# Shared-instance safety: only delete applications whose name is in
# application_names - never a blanket wipe of every application in the
# Concert instance, since other teams/demos may share it.
names_to_delete = set(jsonlib.loads(application_names))
print(f"Concert cleanup scoped to {len(names_to_delete)} application name(s):", sorted(names_to_delete))

apps_url = f"{concert_url.rstrip('/')}/core/api/v1/applications"
rc, apps_data = curl_json("GET", apps_url, concert_headers)
all_apps = apps_data.get("applications", []) if rc == 0 else []
matched_apps = [a for a in all_apps if a.get("name") in names_to_delete]
skipped_apps = [a for a in all_apps if a.get("name") not in names_to_delete]

print(f"Found {len(all_apps)} application(s) in this Concert instance total: "
      f"{len(matched_apps)} match our demo, {len(skipped_apps)} belong to others and will be left untouched")

for app in matched_apps:
    app_id = app.get("id")
    rc, _ = curl_json("DELETE", f"{apps_url}/{app_id}", concert_headers)
    print(f"  deleted application '{app.get('name')}' ({app_id}): {'ok' if rc == 0 else 'FAILED'}")

print("Demo applications removed from Concert - ready for a fresh demo run. "
      "Other teams' data in this shared instance was left untouched.")
`

meta.description: Resets the demo to a repeatable starting point: reverts the two vulnerable files on main back to the vulnerable-baseline git tag, and deletes all applications/source_repos/build_artifacts/environments/certificates from the Concert instance. Run this before every demo.
